channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dak Prescott engineers clutch touchdown drive to give Cowboys win over Steelers
item.description: Into the wee hours of Monday morning, Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott delivered a game-winning touchdown drive and helped beat the Pittsburgh Steelers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tossed balls from stands, apparently aimed at Profar, interrupts Padres' win in NLDS Game 2
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tempers flared on the field and in the stands at Dodger Stadium, with rowdy fans tossing baseballs, apparently at San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar, and then trash that caused a 12-minute wait between pitches during the seventh inning of the Padres' 10-2 win in NL Division S
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 10 points in abbreviated preseason debut with New York Knicks
item.description: Jalen Brunson thought twice about going 1-on-2 in transition, instead dribbled back outside and flipped the ball behind him to Karl-Anthony Towns, who made a 3-pointer with a defender in his face.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stenhouse snaps 65-race losing streak after late crash at Talladega scrambles playoff picture
item.description: Ricky Stenhouse Jr. snapped a 65-race losing streak by winning in overtime at Talladega on Sunday after a late crash collected more than half the field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ionescu scores 22 points to lead Liberty to 76-62 win over Aces and into WNBA Finals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Sabrina Ionescu didn't take long to make a quick statement that what transpired not even 48 hours earlier would not happen again. But she and her Liberty teammates had an even larger message to deliver.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phillies bench slumping third baseman Alec Bohm in Game 2 of the NLDS
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Looking for any kind of jolt for a slumping offense, the Philadelphia Phillies benched All-Star third baseman Alec Bohm for Game 2 of the NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Seahawks' Rayshawn Jenkins returns fumble over 100 yards for TD vs Giants
item.description: Seattle Seahawks defensive back Rayshawn Jenkins returned a fumble more than 100 yards for a touchdown against the New York Giants on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets' Rodgers leaves London 'banged up' with a sprained ankle and a tough loss to Vikings
item.description: LONDON (AP) — London has not been good to Aaron Rodgers. The New York Jets quarterback has lost both times he has played there and heads home “banged up” again after throwing three interceptions in a 23-17 defeat against the Minnesota Vikings at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coco Gauff wins China Open final in straight sets, Sinner and Alcaraz advance in Shanghai
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — Coco Gauff won her second title this season with a lopsided 6-1, 6-3 victory over Karolina Muchova in the final of the China Open on Sunday. Aged 20, the sixth-ranked U.S. player became the youngest China Open champion in 14 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ten Hag future up in the air after Man United draws at Villa. Tottenham collapses in 3-2 loss
item.description: For Erik ten Hag, it's very simple. “We are all on board, together, on one page,” the Manchester United manager said of his relationship with the club’s leadership after a 0-0 draw at Aston Villa in the Premier League on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers pregame: Kittle, Warner active vs. Cardinals; McCaffrey on mend
item.description: While Christian McCaffrey is making encouraging strides with his Achilles issues, the 49ers will suit up injured stars George Kittle and Fred Warner in today's game against the Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jets kicker's pre-game warmups interrupted by Vikings cheerleaders in hilarious scene
item.description: New York Jets kicker Greg Zuerlein had to wait for the right moment to kick pre-game field goals, as the Minnesota Vikings cheerleaders performed right in the middle of where he kicked.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 8 Miami rallies from 25 points down to beat California 39-38
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (AP) — Halfway through his first season at Miami, Cam Ward already has shown a knack for the dramatic. Ward threw a 5-yard touchdown pass to Elijah Arroyo with 26 seconds left and No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs remain banged up but carry confidence into Thursday's Falcons clash
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are riding momentum into Thursday night’s NFC South clash with the Atlanta Falcons but so far, the short game week has presented many challenges.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC
